Kando Martial Arts.name: Kando Martial Arts
Kando Martial Arts.colors: Primary Black #000000, Brand Gold #C59617, White #FFFFFF, Mountain Green #154734 (tertiary, rarely used in ads). Gold is the defining accent — used on wordmark, kicking figure silhouette, CTA buttons. Black backgrounds in hero sections and ad overlays.
Kando Martial Arts.fonts: Logo wordmark: heavy condensed sans-serif, all-caps, wide tracking (Anton or Bank Gothic). Body/web: clean geometric sans (Open Sans or similar). Never change font or stack wordmark without icon.
Kando Martial Arts.tone: Grounded, Encouraging, Direct, Warm, Unpretentious. Short sentences. Gets to the point fast. Community-forward language. Explicitly addresses 'not sporty' and 'beginner' audiences. No empty inspiration-speak. No elite athlete framing.
Kando Martial Arts.dos: Use specific, concrete student outcomes. Address adults who feel uncoordinated and parents who are sceptical. Community and family language — belonging is a recurring hook. Mention age-band breadth (age 3 to adult). Reference 7 Melbourne locations and 25+ years.
Kando Martial Arts.donts: No empty inspiration-speak. No elite athlete framing. No intimidation. No shame or pressure. Do not use Mountain Green in ad creative.
Kando Martial Arts.guidelines: Victoria's most accessible, community-led martial arts school. Tagline: 'Be Your Best'. Disciplines: Shukokai Karate, Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, Philippine Martial Arts, Women's Self Protection, Fitness Kickboxing. 7 locations: Rowville, Hughesdale, Nunawading, Highett, Burwood, Knox, Mulgrave. Founded 1997. AKF and Karate Victoria accredited. CTA buttons: Gold (#C59617) fill with black text, or black fill with Gold text.

Love Thy Oils.name: Love Thy Oils
Love Thy Oils.colors: Forest Green #1B3B2A (headlines, logo, CTA text), Terracotta #D4654A (social proof bar, offer bars), Warm Cream #F5EDE2 (primary ad canvas — default background for all static ads), Off White #F8F5EC (secondary background). Secondary palette (product labels only, not ad backgrounds): Olive Yellow #C5C97A, Dusty Blush #D8A8B0, Soft Lavender #B8B0D4, Warm Brown #9E6A4E, Lemon Yellow #E8D45A, Sage Green #8EB89A, Powder Blue #B8C8D8, Muted Teal #8EB0B8, Stone Grey #C8CECE.
Love Thy Oils.fonts: Headlines: Bricolage Grotesque Bold/ExtraBold (confirmed 96pt on brand asset). Body/subheadings: Poppins Regular/Medium. Both are Google Fonts. Bricolage Grotesque used for hero headlines and ad creative text overlays.
Love Thy Oils.tone: Warm, Transparent, Grounded, Reassuring, Approachable. Second-person nurturing ('you deserve to know exactly what you're using'). Purity-led confidence ('nothing more, nothing less'). Functional calm. Avoids clinical language, heavy wellness jargon, MLM-style hype.
Love Thy Oils.dos: Use Warm Cream (#F5EDE2) as default ad canvas. Dark Green (#1B3B2A) for all headlines and body copy on ads. Full-width Terracotta banner with white Bricolage Grotesque bold for review counts and star ratings. Soft diffused natural lighting. Centre-anchored product photography with hand presence. Portrait crop preferred (4:5 or 9:16). Amber glass bottles as hero. Minimal organic textures: linen, raw wood, stone, dried botanicals.
Love Thy Oils.donts: Never use white text on cream backgrounds. Do not use secondary palette colors (lavender, blush, sage, teal) as ad layout backgrounds — product labels only. No plastic props, no bright artificial surfaces. No clinical whiteness. No MLM-style hype.
Love Thy Oils.guidelines: Australian made and owned, blended and bottled in Australia. Tagline: 'Wellness, Guided by Nature'. Positioned against MLM brands (doTERRA, Young Living) as the honest, locally made alternative. Products: essential oils, diffusers, aroma jewellery, roller bottles, carrier oils, value packs, subscription box. Design credit: Quartrdesign.

NX Co.name: NX Co
NX Co.colors: Jet Black #0A0A0A (dominant — product colour, hero background, CTA background, text on light surfaces), Warm White #F5F2ED (typography on dark surfaces, premium alternative to pure white), Page Background Light #ECEAE4 (soft greige for product overview pages). Intentionally monochromatic — NO accent colour in consumer-facing identity. Do NOT use coral/terracotta #E8725A in ad creative (internal diagrams only).
NX Co.fonts: Headlines: Monument Bold — heavy grotesque sans-serif, wide tracking, always ALL CAPS. Body/subheads/CTAs: Garet Bold — clean geometric sans-serif, medium-to-bold weight. No script fonts, serif fonts, decorative typefaces, mixed-case headlines, gradient text, or outlined letterforms.
NX Co.tone: Unapologetic, Performance-focused, Minimal, Confident, Direct. Communicates like an athlete who has already won. No motivational fluff. No hype language. Performance is assumed, not performed. 'No Excuses' as ethos — the bag removes friction so the only variable left is you.
NX Co.dos: ALL CAPS headlines with wide letter-spacing. Monochromatic palette only. High-contrast CTAs: white #F5F2ED on black #0A0A0A or vice versa. Garet Bold for CTAs. Minimal border-radius (2-4px max). No shadows, no gradients. Australian-owned positioning. Feature the consolidation promise (one bag replaces three).
NX Co.donts: No bright colours, neon, pastels, gradients, transparency effects, drop shadows on type, colour-tinted photography filters. No accent colours in ad creative. No script, serif or decorative fonts. No mixed-case headlines. No glossy or heat-transferred logo treatments.
NX Co.guidelines: Australian-owned premium gym bag and meal prep backpack brand. Tagline: 'No Excuses'. Stylised as NX.co digitally. Products: ProPack Mini $219.95, ProPack $329.95. Primary distribution: DTC Shopify. Ad platforms: Meta and TikTok. Best ROAS audience: Women 25-34. Brand identity is gender-neutral and unisex. Trusted by NABBA and ICN competitive athletes. Founder: Alicia (female-founded). Website: nxco.com.au.

Sleek n Sheek.name: Sleek n Sheek
Sleek n Sheek.colors: Charcoal #2B2B2B (primary ink — headlines, CTAs, iconography), Clean White #FFFFFF (backgrounds, product photography), Soft Cream #F6F6F1 (signature background across hero and product sections), Light Gray #E5E7EB (dividers), Warm Beige #ECEBE3 (active states, alternate sections), Border Gray #BBBBBB (input outlines, card edges). CTA: Charcoal #2B2B2B fill, white label, uppercase DM Sans, 4px radius, no shadow.
Sleek n Sheek.fonts: Headlines: Space Mono Bold — monospace, uppercase or label-style, wide letter-spacing. Body/captions: DM Sans Regular/Medium — geometric sans-serif, clean, readable at small sizes.
Sleek n Sheek.tone: Reassuring, Practical, Premium-calm, Inclusive, Direct. Comfort-first narrative. Anti-roll, no harsh restriction. Targets women who want all-day wearability over extreme compression.
Sleek n Sheek.dos: Airy grid-based layouts with generous whitespace. Multiple body types in all photography — this is non-negotiable. Neutral surfaces: cream, white, light beige. Soft diffused studio light. Model-forward full body to waist crop. Show anti-roll waistband staying in place. Show no visible lines under clothing. Real women in relatable settings.
Sleek n Sheek.donts: No harsh compression messaging. No aspirational fantasy. No celebrity tie-in. No busy backgrounds. No dramatic or directional flash. No heavy Instagram filters or oversaturated looks.
Sleek n Sheek.guidelines: Comfort-first shapewear brand. Tagline: 'Comfort-first shapewear. Second skin.' DTC ecommerce on Shopify, ships US. Price range: $54–$80 USD. 30-day returns, free exchanges. Key features: anti-roll waistband, no visible seams, open-bust options, bathroom-friendly closures. Website: sleekandsheek.com.

The Muscle Establishment.name: The Muscle Establishment
The Muscle Establishment.colors: Black #000000 (primary background — slight warmth #0D0D0D to #111111 on site), White #FFFFFF (all headlines and body text on dark backgrounds), Cyan #34E1E0 (primary accent — CTAs, hover states, section labels, logo ring, coach name, stat bars on result cards), Pink #FE99D7 (secondary accent — female client result cards, secondary CTA elements). Sharp-cornered rectangle CTAs, no border radius.
The Muscle Establishment.fonts: Headlines: Sora Bold — all caps, ultra-heavy weight, tight tracking. Sub-headline/body: Space Grotesk Medium/Regular — clean geometric sans. Distinctive treatment: short cyan horizontal rule before section labels (e.g., '— RESULTS', '— COACHING PACKAGES').
The Muscle Establishment.tone: Aspirational, Authoritative, Direct, Intense, Results-obsessed. Speaks to busy professionals, people with events (weddings, holidays, photoshoots), police/military clients. Fast and measurable results framing. No beginner wellness product positioning.
The Muscle Establishment.dos: Lead with speed of results: Joe 15kg in 7 weeks (age 62), Courtney 2 dress sizes in 4 weeks. Use Jacob Vella's police/military background as authority signal. Dense content-forward layouts. Cyan rule separator before section labels. App-based coaching ecosystem positioning (120+ exercise videos, training + nutrition + messaging + calendar). PED-informed guidance where relevant.
The Muscle Establishment.donts: No wellness/lifestyle brand framing. No bro-science coaching. No generic plan delivery. Not MyFitnessPal-style generic coaching. Do not treat founder's critical incident (stabbing) as trauma narrative — frame as authority/discipline signal only.
The Muscle Establishment.guidelines: Premium Australian online physique coaching brand. Abbreviation: TME. Tagline: 'Where limits become legends.' Founder: Jacob Vella — Former NSW Police Force (Frontline & Proactive Crime Units 2016–2024), competitive bodybuilder, 15+ years experience, qualified sports nutritionist. Critical incident: stabbed in line of duty 2019, returned to full policing post-recovery, left policing 2024 to run TME full-time. Website: tmestablishment.com. Primary market: busy professionals, men and women 25–40, NSW Australia.

Wholesome Bowl.name: Wholesome Bowl
Wholesome Bowl.colors: Forest Green #1B4332 (dominant — logo, packaging header bands, CTAs, section headers), Warm Cream #F5F0DC / #FFFDF4 (background on packaging, website canvas, photography surfaces), Off-White #F5F5F5 (background), Warm Gold/Wheat #C9A84C (icon highlights, stat callouts, label accent lines), Burgundy/Red #8B1A1A (colour-coding Beef/Kimchi flavour variants), Light Cream #EDE0B0 (secondary warm, photo grading). CTAs: Forest Green fill, white text or green text on cream.
Wholesome Bowl.fonts: Headlines: Axiforma Bold — geometric sans-serif, rounded letterforms, modern but approachable. Subheadings: Avian — softer, lighter weight with humanist qualities. Body/UI: system sans-serif/Arial fallback. Sentence case for headlines. ALL CAPS used sparingly for label callouts (e.g. '17G PROTEIN').
Wholesome Bowl.tone: Warm, Genuine, Wholesome, Punchy, Optimistic. Problem-led setup, always resolves to feel-good outcome. Short headlines, functional USPs stated as facts not fluff. Relatable founder-led storytelling.
Wholesome Bowl.dos: Use oversized numerals as visual anchor elements (17g, 6g, 16). Hero overhead flat-lay OR tight 45-degree 3/4 angle on the bowl. Warm golden-toned grade with lifted highlights. Creamy mid-tones. Keep herbs/vegetables vivid as contrast pop. Bowl always central, packaging as supporting element. Generous negative space. Mention: 17g protein, 6g fibre, 16 essential vitamins and minerals, certified meal replacement.
Wholesome Bowl.donts: No cool-blue or clinical grading. No high-contrast fashion-editorial looks. No cluttered or busy compositions. No deep shadows.
Wholesome Bowl.guidelines: Only instant noodle certified as complete meal replacement (Food Standards Australia & NZ). Certified: halal facility. Founder: Mez Jamali (former Halo Top ice cream CEO, Australia). Founded 2020, launched 2023. Market: Australia — ecommerce + independent health food retail. Taglines: 'Elevate Your Noodle Love' / 'Crafted for Noodle Lovers' / 'Bowls with Balance'. Website: wholesomebowl.com.

Explicit Essentials.name: Explicit Essentials
Explicit Essentials.colors: Near-black Charcoal #1A1A1A (dominant text, CTA fill on light backgrounds, packaging base), Dusty Salmon/Rose #E8877A (subheads, accent elements, CTA fill on dark backgrounds, select headlines), Muted Burgundy/Mauve #8B4A52 (depth and sophistication, sparingly), Sage Teal #4A8B7F (freshness and natural credibility, sparingly), Olive/Chartreuse #8B8A1A (unexpected pop, very sparingly), Off-White Cream #FAF8F4 (default canvas for all static ads). Extended palette for SKU colour-coding: Lavender #C4BEDA, Dusty Sage #BDD0C8, Blush #EDD5D5, Slate Blue #7A9BB5, Muted Violet #6B5B7B, Deep Navy #1A2B4A, Pale Yellow #E8E87A, Deep Purple #4A1A6B (F Bomb Mom / F*cking Exhausted SKUs).
Explicit Essentials.fonts: Headlines: Inter Bold — large scale, high contrast, sentence case or ALL CAPS, tight tracking. Subheads/body/CTAs: Poppins Medium or Semibold. Both are Google Fonts. CTA buttons: rounded pill or rounded rectangle, no drop shadows, no gradients.
Explicit Essentials.tone: Bold, Irreverent, Empowering, Witty, Unapologetic. Profanity used as natural punctuation, not shock value. Writes like the funniest, most honest person in your group chat. Warm underneath the edge. Gifter angle: 'he solved the problem' not 'she'll love it'. Self-purchaser angle: 'you deserve this' not 'treat yourself'.
Explicit Essentials.dos: Short punchy copy — one idea per sentence. Title Case for headlines. Profanity where it lands naturally. Use social proof: '150,000+ customers' for volume claims, '30,000+ reviews at 4.9★' for review credibility. Static 1:1 format (1080x1080px) only. Trust badge block: Fast & free shipping / Women-owned & operated / 100% cruelty-free / 4.9★ loved by 30k+. Gifting-failure humour. Product names ARE the marketing (F Bomb Mom, Fucking Exhausted, Bitch Relax).
Explicit Essentials.donts: NO em dashes — ever. No brand name in body copy. No first-person 'I' as ad narrator. No sentimental framing. No fabricated product claims — verify shipping thresholds and pricing live. No Australian cultural references — US market only. No 4:5 or Story format. No harsh shadows, no AI glow, no clinical white backgrounds, no oversaturated colour.
Explicit Essentials.guidelines: Women-owned and operated. Handmade in small batches in Tennessee. Founder: Sam (7 years). Products: bath salts, shower steamers, hand & body lotion, gift box sets, men's collection, body sprays, body wash, body wipes, chafing powder. Price range: $11.99–$44.99. Primary campaign market: United States only (US audience, US cultural references). Website: explicitessentials.com. 30,000+ reviews at 4.9 stars. 150,000+ customers.
